base_url.description: Outbrain Amplify API base URL override for tests or proxies.

username.description: Outbrain Amplify username; used with the password secret for HTTP Basic auth when access_token is not set.

access_token.description: Outbrain Amplify API access token. Takes precedence over username/password when set; sent as a Bearer token.

password.description: Outbrain Amplify password; used with the username config value for HTTP Basic auth when access_token is not set.

marketer_id.description: Optional marketer ID. Reserved for a future Pass B capability: legacy scopes campaigns and performance_reports to /marketers/{marketer_id}/... when set, but this bundle currently reads only the unscoped /campaigns and /reports endpoints and does NOT consume this value — see Known limits in docs.md.

start_date.description: Date in the format YYYY-MM-DD; sent as the start_date report filter. Any data before this date will not be replicated.

end_date.description: Date in the format YYYY-MM-DD; sent as the end_date report filter.

report_granularity.description: Granularity used for periodic data in performance reports (e.g. daily, weekly, monthly, all).

conversion_count.description: Definition of conversion count in performance reports (e.g. view, click, viewAndClick).

geo_location_breakdown.description: Granularity used for geo location data in performance reports (e.g. country, region, dma).

max_pages.description: Maximum pages; use 0, all, or unlimited to exhaust the stream.

mode.description: Runtime mode: live (default) or fixture for credential-free conformance.
